summary: Summary: At the start, Speaker1 (customer service) asks neutrally if they can help; Speaker2 responds with anger and frustration about missing luggage that contains his mother's urn and the impending funeral. Speaker1 tries to assist, remaining neutral at first but growing frustration as they cannot locate the bag and as Speaker2 lashes out and is redirected between staff. Speaker2 becomes increasingly angry and frustrated and at times excited in demanding immediate action, and expresses sadness when mentioning the funeral, which raises the urgency. Toward the end, Speaker1 identifies as the manager and offers a 7–10 business day resolution, prompting happiness from Speaker1 but leaving Speaker2 still angry and frustrated and focused on a more immediate solution.
